summary: TWO_COLUMN Hoeffding inequality: P(|X̄_n-0.5|≥0.1) ≤ 2 e^(-2nt²). LEFT axes with RED dashed 2e^(-2nt²) bound curve + always_redraw YELLOW empirical dots + line from 1000 Monte Carlo runs at n=5, 10, 20, ..., 2000. ValueTracker idx_tr reveals points. RIGHT live n, empirical tail, and bound — empirical always below.
